name: @parcha/autoqa
description: Self-QA any repo end-to-end: discover how it runs, plan a feature test matrix, execute against a live instance, report with witnesses

scripts.test: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v && python3 -m json.tool .claude-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool .codex-plugin/plugin.json >/dev/null

author: Miguel Rios
